name: On Point
short_description: On Point is an arcade-inspired VR first person shooter, filled with Warioware-style minigames. Think, aim, and blast your way to a high score through endless shooting minigames, but don't hit those bombs or you'll run out of lives!
detailed_description:
On Point is an arcade-inspired VR first person shooter, filled with Warioware-style minigames. Think, aim, and blast your way to a high score through over 100 shooting minigames, but don't hit those bombs or you'll run out of lives!


ABOUT

  • Compete in over 100 arcade-style target shooting minigames.

  • Earn Tickets and Unlock new Minigames.

  • Calibrate, Chill, Expert, One-off, and Marathon modes.

  • Local, global, and friends leaderboards.

  • Run riot through wacky arcade worlds.

  • Immersive VR experience, tuned for all experience and comfort levels.

  • Various accessibility options to tune comfort and difficulty.



GAME MODES

  • Calibrate: New tutorial level to get you started. After completing calibration, you'll start earning Arcade Tickets (while playing in Chill or Expert mode). Use your tickets to unlock new mini-games and game modes!

  • Chill: Learn the ropes in some of the key types of mini-games, or just practice without much pressure.

  • Expert: Up the stakes with a huge variety of more difficult mini-games that you’ll need to unlock as you progress. Similar to the classic arcade-style gameplay.

  • One-Off Mode (NEW): Play individual mini-games to hone your skills and strive for S Rank on everything. Unlock more minigames here with your Arcade Tickets

  • Marathon Mode (NEW): Oops - all mini-games! Yep, every single one of them, in a row. Can you unlock this challenge, and make it through all 115? This is the ultimate test of accuracy and endurance: stretch your trigger fingers, loosen up your arms, make sure that headset is fully charged, and stay hydrated! (please play within your limits).
